tweet.text: Prism is currently the best deck in classic constructed for the Flesh and Blood TCG https://t.co/nSoz4YQAjR

RT @aaronnwsn: A vid on my thoughts for the impending Zen bans, check it out 🤟🏼
As always I appreciate the like and subscribe… I promise…
Babies are so funny when they sleepy. Lol 😂 you can just go to sleep fam! Nobody is stopping you! You ain’t gotta cry about it!!!!!!

I’m glad Lupe Tortilla getting the respect they deserve! Also that Wings N More goes crazy!
Don’t sleep on Potato Shack though!!! 👀👀👀 it’s kinda ducked off so it ain’t as busy after the games! Used to be me and @Erik_McCoy_73 spot! Lol 😂 https://t.co/F8GyRa9tfq
RT @THETannonGrace: Split in the top 4 of a cash tournament today with the same deck (one small change). Deck is great. Brennan is smart.

It really is weird how the day I want Chic Fil A the most is on Sundays.
I also see this happen to a lot of other people. I wonder why?
RT @fabtcg: The results from Week 2 of Skirmish are in... Prism's had a busy weekend, and THREE heroes have reached Living Legend in Blitz!…

RT @TariqPatel10: I woke up to the news of Kaiser Wong's 2 month suspension.
Kaiser, despite the unfortunate outcome, your reputation rema…

I have to say as much as I hate the Tome of Divinity ban…. I do think the ban list was pretty solid!
Also I didn’t see Tome of Harvests on the banlist!? Verdance going Yum Yum! #Rosetta
RT @MaskOfMomentum: Bro wtf https://t.co/gGtdkYXnGn

RT @fabtcg: Banned and Restricted Announcement:
https://t.co/VvPtefyQRO https://t.co/uGTvZWX05p
RT @Hpat612: I heard ya’ll may need new decks? 😂😂🫢
RT @aaronnwsn: Ima need some time to process this… @james_white https://t.co/fs3uATcBAr

RT @KodachiOne: *Dusts off Last Ditch Efforts*
Ok but for real, the transparency/communication to change in these updates are unmatched. #…
Hmmmmm 🤔🤔🤔 @mbpRivals https://t.co/Kisnt1WQ74
RT @SifnTCG: Check out both decks they look sweet gonna play them on stream today as well as some other spice everyone come through 5:30pm…
This shit fast AF! Lol 😂 way to many aggro decks https://t.co/81sbxsn0pD

Hoping DIO is as good as it’s been claimed…. Otherwise it feels like a
“Pick your Runeblade Meta.”

Salute Mr Patrick!
The largest pioneer for this game in the States!
FaB is definitely a game that takes a ton of prep and focus! Can’t cheat the grind!
The game was lucky to have had you!
Good luck in your future endeavors!
Also 😂 I’m in San Diego as well so hit me up! https://t.co/xXna80nJcv
RT @armada_dm: 👀👀 https://t.co/YpI0xbMtig
RT @GUNDAM_GCG_ENG: [NEWS] The worldwide release of the “GUNDAM Card Game” is coming in 2025! Before this the “GUNDAM Card Game Edition Bet…
Game looks like it’s going to be hype!!!! https://t.co/pXsc5PzABE
Padres win tonight and tbh…. If the Yankees can’t win the World Series against these teams then they never gonna do it
Let’s goooooo!!! @GUNDAM_GCG_ENG https://t.co/mw0BhI00Wo
RT @GUNDAM_GCG_ENG: Today is your last chance to visit our booth. Come and visit us in TT740!! #PAXAus #gcg #Gundam https://t.co/tlwTokNAtl

Coach Elko going to have us ready!
Feels like Mississippi State has been the catalyst in snowballing into underwhelming seasons after really good starts! Will be nice to see us finally get over that hump! #GigEm https://t.co/kdetKNOnkJ
